# Rule Analysis: Windows_Hacktool_SharpHound_Elastic.yar

## Rule Info

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Source | elastic/protections-artifacts |
| Author | Elastic Security |
| Type | YARA |
| Target | Binary |
| Severity | 100 |

## Patterns

### Pattern 1: $guid0
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Pattern | `A517A8DE-5834-411D-ABDA-2D0E1766539C` |
| Type | GUID (TypeLib) |
| Location | .NET Assembly metadata |
| Detection | TypeLib GUID embedded in compiled binary |

**Source**: This is the `ProjectGuid` in the `.csproj` file or auto-generated by Visual Studio.

**Evasion Strategy**: Regenerate GUID in project file.

### Pattern 2: $guid1
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Pattern | `90A6822C-4336-433D-923F-F54CE66BA98F` |
| Type | GUID (TypeLib) |
| Location | .NET Assembly metadata |
| Detection | TypeLib GUID embedded in compiled binary |

**Evasion Strategy**: Regenerate GUID in project file.

### Pattern 3: $print_str0
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Pattern | `Initializing SharpHound at {time} on {date}` |
| Type | String literal |
| Location | `src/SharpLinks.cs:50` |
| Detection | Log message string |

**Source Code**:
```csharp
context.Logger.LogInformation("Initializing SharpHound at {time} on {date}", ...);
```

**Evasion Strategy**: Modify string to generic message.

### Pattern 4: $print_str1
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Pattern | `SharpHound completed {Number} loops! Zip file written to {Filename}` |
| Type | String literal |
| Location | `src/Runtime/LoopManager.cs:80` |
| Detection | Log message string |

**Source Code**:
```csharp
_context.Logger.LogInformation("SharpHound completed {Number} loops! Zip file written to {Filename} ", ...);
```

**Evasion Strategy**: Modify string to generic message.

### Pattern 5: $print_str2
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Pattern | `[-] Removed DCOM Collection` |
| Type | String literal |
| Location | `src/Options.cs:244` |
| Detection | Log message string |

**Source Code**:
```csharp
updates.Add("[-] Removed DCOM Collection");
```

**Evasion Strategy**: Modify string to generic message.

## Condition Analysis

```
$guid0 or $guid1 or all of ($print_str*)
```

- **Logic**: Match if ANY GUID matches OR ALL print strings match
- **Implication**: Evading GUIDs alone is sufficient, OR evading all 3 print strings

## Evasion Plan

| Priority | Pattern | Strategy | Effort |
|----------|---------|----------|--------|
| 1 | $guid0, $guid1 | Regenerate GUIDs in .csproj | Low |
| 2 | $print_str0 | Modify string | Low |
| 3 | $print_str1 | Modify string | Low |
| 4 | $print_str2 | Modify string | Low |

## Implementation

### 1. Regenerate GUIDs (Priority 1)

Edit `Sharphound.csproj`:
```xml
<ProjectGuid>{NEW-GUID-HERE}</ProjectGuid>
```

Or remove `<ProjectGuid>` entirely to let MSBuild generate a new one.

### 2. Modify Print Strings (Priority 2)

**File: src/SharpLinks.cs:50**
```csharp
// Before
context.Logger.LogInformation("Initializing SharpHound at {time} on {date}", ...);

// After
context.Logger.LogInformation("Initializing AD Collector at {time} on {date}", ...);
```

**File: src/Runtime/LoopManager.cs:80**
```csharp
// Before
_context.Logger.LogInformation("SharpHound completed {Number} loops! Zip file written to {Filename} ", ...);

// After
_context.Logger.LogInformation("Collection completed {Number} loops! Output written to {Filename} ", ...);
```

**File: src/Options.cs:244**
```csharp
// Before
updates.Add("[-] Removed DCOM Collection");

// After
updates.Add("[-] Removed DCOM Enum");
```

## Verification

```bash
# After modification, verify strings are removed
grep -rn "SharpHound" src/
grep -rn "Initializing SharpHound" src/
grep -rn "SharpHound completed" src/
```

## Status

| Pattern | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| $guid0 | Pending | Regenerate in .csproj |
| $guid1 | Pending | Regenerate in .csproj |
| $print_str0 | Pending | Modify in SharpLinks.cs |
| $print_str1 | Pending | Modify in LoopManager.cs |
| $print_str2 | Pending | Modify in Options.cs |
